claim: DeepSpeed Ulysses context parallelism reduces attention activation memory by 8x
actionable: Apply DeepSpeed Ulysses to distributed training for long-context LLMs

claim: Activation checkpointing reduces activation memory by another 8x with minimal computational overhead
actionable: Enable activation checkpointing in transformer training to reduce memory requirements

claim: Untied Ulysses chunks attention heads further to enable reusable buffers across iterations
actionable: Implement Untied Ulysses for additional memory savings beyond standard Ulysses parallelism
